protocol.name: AIMS WPT Authentication Flow
protocol.description: Agent Identity Management System - WIMSE Proof Token (WPT) authentication. An agent uses its WIT and a request-bound WPT to authenticate to a target service.

entities.name: AI Agent
entities.description: AI agent authenticating to access a target service

entities.name: Target Service
entities.description: Service that the agent wants to access

entities.name: SPIFFE Trust Bundle
entities.description: Distributes trust domain public keys for WIT verification

phases.name: Proof Token Creation
phases.description: Agent creates a WPT bound to the specific request

phases.name: Request Submission
phases.description: Agent sends request with WIT and WPT

phases.name: Verification
phases.description: Target service verifies WIT and WPT

flows.label: Create WPT (iss=SPIFFE ID, aud, htm, htu, nonce)
flows.description: Create WIMSE Proof Token binding to specific HTTP request

flows.label: Sign WPT with Agent Key
flows.description: Sign WPT with the key bound in the WIT's cnf claim

flows.label: POST /api/action (Authorization: Bearer WIT, Workload-Identity-Token: WPT)
flows.description: Send request with WIT as Bearer token and WPT in header

flows.label: GET /trust-bundle (Trust Domain Keys)
flows.description: Fetch SPIFFE trust bundle for WIT verification

flows.label: Verify WIT Signature + Validate Claims
flows.description: Verify WIT signature with trust bundle and validate iss, sub, aud, exp

flows.label: Extract cnf Claim (Proof Key)
flows.description: Extract the confirmation key from WIT for WPT verification

flows.label: Verify WPT Signature with cnf Key
flows.description: Verify WPT was signed by the key bound in WIT

flows.label: Validate Request Binding (htm, htu, nonce)
flows.description: Verify WPT htm/htu match actual request method/URI

flows.label: Check Replay (jti, nonce, iat)
flows.description: Ensure WPT hasn't been replayed using jti/nonce/iat

flows.label: Authorize Based on SPIFFE ID
flows.description: Apply authorization policy based on agent's SPIFFE ID
